name: Software Development
description: Build websites, mobile apps, and software solutions using modern technologies.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer (React)
jobs.job_description: Develop interactive user interfaces and integrate APIs using React.js.

jobs.title: Backend Developer (Node.js)
jobs.job_description: Build scalable server-side logic and maintain robust databases using Node.js.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.job_description: Manage end-to-end development from database architecture to frontend styling.

jobs.title: Junior Software Engineer
jobs.job_description: Assist in coding, debugging, and testing software modules under senior supervision.

jobs.title: Mobile App Developer (Flutter)
jobs.job_description: Create cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android using Flutter.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.job_description: Automate deployment pipelines and manage cloud infrastructure for high availability.

name: Graphic Design
description: Create visual content, branding, and marketing materials.

jobs.title: Graphic Designer
jobs.job_description: Design creative layouts for print and digital media using Adobe Creative Suite.

jobs.title: Brand Designer
jobs.job_description: Develop visual identities, including logos, typography, and brand guidelines.

jobs.title: UI Designer
jobs.job_description: Craft high-fidelity visual interfaces and assets for web and mobile platforms.

jobs.title: Motion Graphics Designer
jobs.job_description: Create engaging 2D/3D animations and visual effects for marketing videos.

jobs.title: Packaging Designer
jobs.job_description: Design structural and visual concepts for product packaging and labels.

jobs.title: Social Media Designer
jobs.job_description: Create eye-catching posts, stories, and banners for various social platforms.

name: Digital Marketing
description: Promote brands through social media, SEO, and online advertising.

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Executive
jobs.job_description: Execute digital campaigns across search engines and social media to drive leads.

jobs.title: SEO Specialist
jobs.job_description: Perform keyword research and on-page/off-page optimization to improve rankings.

jobs.title: Social Media Manager
jobs.job_description: Manage community engagement and content calendars for client social channels.

jobs.title: Content Marketing Manager
jobs.job_description: Oversee the creation and distribution of high-value blogs, whitepapers, and videos.

jobs.title: PPC Specialist
jobs.job_description: Manage paid search and display campaigns with a focus on maximizing ROI.

jobs.title: Email Marketing Executive
jobs.job_description: Design and automate email newsletters to nurture leads and retain customers.

name: Data Science
description: Analyze data to extract insights and build predictive models.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.job_description: Clean, process, and visualize data to help stakeholders make informed decisions.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.job_description: Design and implement ML algorithms and predictive models for real-world apps.

jobs.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
jobs.job_description: Build interactive dashboards and reports to track key business performance metrics.

jobs.title: AI Research Assistant
jobs.job_description: Support the development of cutting-edge AI technologies through rigorous research.

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.job_description: Build and maintain data pipelines and architectures for large-scale data storage.

jobs.title: Statistician
jobs.job_description: Apply statistical methods to analyze surveys and experiments for scientific accuracy.

name: Cyber Security
description: Protect systems and networks from digital attacks.

jobs.title: Cyber Security Analyst
jobs.job_description: Monitor networks for security breaches and investigate any unauthorized access.

jobs.title: Ethical Hacker
jobs.job_description: Perform penetration tests to identify and fix security vulnerabilities in systems.

jobs.title: Network Security Engineer
jobs.job_description: Design and maintain secure network configurations, firewalls, and VPNs.

jobs.title: Security Consultant
jobs.job_description: Advise organizations on security policies and risk management strategies.

jobs.title: SOC Analyst
jobs.job_description: Provide real-time security monitoring and threat response in a 24/7 environment.

jobs.title: Information Security Officer
jobs.job_description: Oversee the overall security posture and compliance of the organization.

name: UI/UX Design
description: Design user-friendly and attractive digital interfaces.

jobs.title: UI Designer
jobs.job_description: Focus on the visual aesthetics and responsiveness of digital product interfaces.

jobs.title: UX Researcher
jobs.job_description: Conduct user interviews and usability tests to gather insights for design improvements.

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.job_description: Balance business goals and user needs to design comprehensive product solutions.

jobs.title: Interaction Designer
jobs.job_description: Design user flows and interactive prototypes to ensure intuitive navigation.

jobs.title: UX Writer
jobs.job_description: Create clear and helpful copy within apps to guide users through their journey.

jobs.title: Mobile UI Designer
jobs.job_description: Specialized in designing touch-friendly interfaces specifically for mobile devices.

name: Accounting & Finance
description: Manage company finances, budgets, and financial reporting.

jobs.title: Accountant
jobs.job_description: Maintain general ledgers and prepare accurate monthly financial statements.

jobs.title: Financial Analyst
jobs.job_description: Analyze market trends and financial data to support investment decisions.

jobs.title: Audit Officer
jobs.job_description: Conduct internal audits to ensure compliance with financial laws and standards.

jobs.title: Tax Consultant
jobs.job_description: Provide tax planning and compliance services for individuals and corporations.

jobs.title: Finance Executive
jobs.job_description: Handle daily financial operations including invoicing and payroll processing.

jobs.title: Budget Analyst
jobs.job_description: Monitor spending and assist departments in developing annual budgets.

name: Human Resources
description: Handle recruitment, employee management, and workplace policies.

jobs.title: HR Executive
jobs.job_description: Manage day-to-day HR operations and support employee relations initiatives.

jobs.title: Recruitment Officer
jobs.job_description: Source, interview, and onboard qualified candidates for various departments.

jobs.title: HR Manager
jobs.job_description: Lead the HR department and develop strategic people-management policies.

jobs.title: Training Coordinator
jobs.job_description: Organize and facilitate professional development workshops for employees.

jobs.title: Payroll Officer
jobs.job_description: Ensure accurate and timely payment of salaries and benefits to staff.

jobs.title: HR Assistant
jobs.job_description: Provide administrative support to the HR team and maintain employee records.

name: Customer Support
description: Assist customers and resolve product or service issues.

jobs.title: Customer Support Executive
jobs.job_description: Respond to customer inquiries and resolve issues via phone and email.

jobs.title: Call Center Agent
jobs.job_description: Handle high volumes of incoming calls while maintaining a professional tone.

jobs.title: Client Success Manager
jobs.job_description: Build long-term relationships with key clients to ensure product satisfaction.

jobs.title: Technical Support Engineer
jobs.job_description: Provide technical troubleshooting for software or hardware-related problems.

jobs.title: Support Specialist
jobs.job_description: Act as an expert resource for complex customer queries and product training.

jobs.title: Live Chat Support
jobs.job_description: Provide real-time assistance to website visitors through live chat windows.

name: Video Editing
description: Edit and produce professional video content.

jobs.title: Video Editor
jobs.job_description: Edit raw footage into high-quality videos for corporate or creative use.

jobs.title: YouTube Video Editor
jobs.job_description: Specialized in fast-paced editing, thumbnails, and SEO for YouTube channels.

jobs.title: Motion Video Editor
jobs.job_description: Combine traditional editing with motion graphics to create dynamic content.

jobs.title: Film Editor
jobs.job_description: Craft long-form narratives and documentaries through cinematic storytelling.

jobs.title: Short-form Content Editor
jobs.job_description: Optimize video content for Reels, TikTok, and other short-form social platforms.

jobs.title: Post Production Assistant
jobs.job_description: Assist with file management, color grading, and basic assembly of sequences.

name: Project Management
description: Plan, organize, and manage project execution.

jobs.title: Project Manager
jobs.job_description: Lead project teams to deliver complex objectives on time and within budget.

jobs.title: Assistant Project Manager
jobs.job_description: Support lead managers with documentation, scheduling, and task tracking.

jobs.title: IT Project Coordinator
jobs.job_description: Bridge the gap between technical teams and stakeholders for IT implementations.

jobs.title: Scrum Master
jobs.job_description: Facilitate agile ceremonies and help teams remove blockers for better velocity.

jobs.title: Operations Manager
jobs.job_description: Optimize internal processes to improve efficiency across the entire organization.

jobs.title: Program Manager
jobs.job_description: Oversee multiple related projects to achieve high-level strategic business goals.
